title: The Dwarves Are Crushed
description: Pages 6–10 focus on the dwarves are crushed, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Trebol as trebol and Sugar overwhelm the Tontatta and push Usopp into a terrifying decision point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What are you doing, Robilland!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm sorry... but I can't let you dash in like that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He'd get you, for sure....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I saw the body of the fly from earlier.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He landed a shot right between that tiny thing's eyes.

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: Trebol's hand-eye coordination and ability are not to be underesti- Mated!!

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: It's too Dan- Geros to go after sugar as long as he's guarding her.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What are you planning, Robiland?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: gyah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What's with this cargo!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's an army of pink hornets!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ehehe.

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: trebol- Sama, I have a report!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: In sector 4 of the port...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: trouble has broken out among the pirate crew of Captain Ibusu!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They're rampaging around and demanding to speak to an officer regarding the terms of their transactions.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Hmm? They're not scared of defying Joker...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: That takes a lot of guts!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Hmm? Hey... are you a replace- ment for the usual com- municipalities director?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: He's eating at the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: This is an emergency, though!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: We've even got casualties on our side! Please lend us your strength!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Casual- Ties!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I'm coming!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Hey, hey!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: What!! Tre- Bol-sama is coming out of the tower!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: increase security at the four doors of the officers' tower.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: But if anything happens, let me know immediately.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Y... Yes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: sector 4.

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: Whoa, it's Trebol- Sama!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Thanks for always working so hard!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Huh? You mean you're not going to fight, usoland?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: It'd be too easy if I joined in.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: It'd be ideal if I didn't have to join in!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: But this way, you guys will get a con- Fidence Boost!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Just don't worry!! I'm here to save the day in case anything goes wrong!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Whoa! That's so reassur- ing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Whooo's there?

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: Prepare yourself, sugar!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: We've come to save all of our friends...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: ...who've been made to work in that factory!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: And also to knock you out!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: ...knock me out? Hmph... but I don't know anything about your little friends!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Ehhh!!? Really!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Yeah.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Well then never- mind.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Look sharp!! She's tricking you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Ahh!!! th... that was close. Give us back our friends!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Who's feeding you infor- nation?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: I won't believe that you idiots could ever figure out you were being fooled, on you own...

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Tontatta Tribe.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: You guys haven't shown up at the Palace for a whole year now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: So this must have been spurred on by some- one else.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Attack!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: pin her down and open her mouth!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: I don't much like this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: It feels like you're underESTI- Mating me...

summary: The Dwarves Are Crushed focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as trebol and Sugar overwhelm the Tontatta and push Usopp into a terrifying decision point.
